prompt: Clean infographic, split panel: left shows a champagne flute with golden bubbles labeled 'Champagne'. Right shows a red wine glass labeled 'Wine'. Under each: bold text 'Calories (5 oz)' and 'Alcohol (ABV)'. Use realistic glass photos blended with minimal flat design, white background, FitSorted brand accents (orange #F55B17 and deep blue #2D2BC3). Use clear typography. Include values: Champagne 95 kcal, 12% ABV; Wine 125 kcal, 13% ABV. No other text.
